content.en:
Territory No. 5311.

The Black Kite Realm Lord lives here, occupying a Black Kite Mountain Range, and the surrounding area is his territory, and it is also the most powerful existence in this territory.

And there are many extradimensional creatures in this territory, and the cultivators have very few powers, which is also to give the Black Kite Realm Lord face.

is also afraid of the Black Kite Realm Lord, in case the Black Kite Realm Lord is interested and swallows these cultivators in one bite, it will be completely finished.

Therefore, those extradimensional realms did not dare to live here at all, and the cultivators here were all very weak existences.

......

"There are really a lot of extradimensional creatures in the territory of 5311, and these extradimensional creatures are all subservient to the Black Kite Realm Lord. "

Ye Tian also sensed some third-realm extra-dimensional creatures, but he had no interest in these third-realm extra-dimensional creatures.

Soon, he locked on to the breath of the fourth realm superdimensional creature, the Black Kite Realm Lord.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian stepped forward to the location of the Black Kite Realm Lord.

At this time, the Black Kite Realm Lord also sensed Ye Tian's arrival, and when he saw that Ye Tian's cultivation was only in the early stage of the Fourth Realm, he didn't care, but the next moment he sensed the great terror.

"Not good!"

He realizes that something is wrong and is about to flee.

With his speed, even the most powerful Fourth Realm couldn't catch up with him.

Almost instantly, he was about to escape from the territory of 5311.

But at this time, the light of Ye Tian's seventh dimensional will mastery, the Wumu Robbery and Killing Technique, had already penetrated his body, directly shattering the soul will of the Black Kite Realm Lord.

Coming to the corpse of the Black Kite Realm Lord, Ye Tianyi waved his hand and incorporated his corpse into the Multi-Repair Alchemy Treasure Bottle, and then quickly left.

Soon.

The third realm extradimensional creatures here knew that something had happened to the Black Kite Realm Lord, and they wanted to contact the Black Kite Realm Lord, but they had a lot of contacts.

Eventually, they guessed that the Lord of the Black Realm had fallen.

All of a sudden, the news spread throughout the entire Five Thousand Territory.

Compared with the Fourth Realm of the Blazing Sun Realm Lord, the Black Kite Realm Lord is the real top Fourth Realm, and the speed can be called the first in the Five Thousand Realm, even the Six Shadow Realm Lord can't intercept the Black Kite Realm Lord.

But now, the Black Kite Realm Lord has fallen silently, how can this not make the other Fourth Realms afraid!

They were also afraid that they would become the masters of the Black Kite Realm, and many of the Fourth Realms were even so frightened that they fled from the Territory of the Fifth Thousand and went to the Territory of the Four Thousand.

It's even more brutal over there, but if you're careful and don't cause trouble, you'll be able to survive.

But if you stay here, you may be killed one day.

......

"I didn't expect that I killed the Black Kite Realm Lord, and I actually scared away a lot of Fourth Realm!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't care about this matter, but quietly waited for the cultivation essence of the Four Realms to condense and then use it to improve his cultivation, at most a few hundred extradimensional eras, there was a high probability that he would be able to improve his cultivation to the middle of the Fourth Realm.

When the time comes, his extra-dimensional rule realm will be improved a little more, and his strength in all aspects will be improved a little, and he will be able to go to the four thousand territory after raising the Great Realm Armor Technique to the fifth layer.

Time flies.

Before you know it, another 500 extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Soon after, his black mother's body broke through to the second layer of Xiaocheng realm, and his soul will also ushered in a breakthrough.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's soul will began to transform, and it didn't improve much in terms of quantity, but it was a real transformation in terms of quality.

Immediately afterward, he tested it with the Thousand Dimensions Technique, and his soul will broke through the eighth dimension, apparently reaching the eighth dimension.

"The soul will of the eighth dimension, and now the power of the seventh dimension will is much stronger than in the past, and then we have to perfect the Wumu interception technique to the eighth dimension of the will mastery, but this step should be extremely difficult, and ten thousand extra-dimensional epochs may not be able to achieve it!"

And after his soul will reached the eighth dimension, the Rock Will Method was almost ineffective.

Unless he can create a more subtle method of refining the soul will, or find a better treasure to refine the soul will, it will be difficult to improve quickly.

In the past few hundred extradimensional opportunities, Ye Tian cultivated the Great Realm Armor Technique to the fifth layer of the highest realm, and when he reached this layer, he could not enter.

And he also cultivated the Sanwu Secret Method to the second level of the Dacheng realm, thanks to the advancement of the Ka Ye wisdom body, which caused the effect of the multi-dimensional wisdom light to skyrocket, otherwise he would not have been able to cultivate the second layer of the Sanwu Secret Method to the Dacheng realm so quickly.

But at this point, it is difficult for him to improve quickly in all aspects, and if he wants to continue to advance, the unit is afraid that it is in the unit of a thousand extradimensional eras.

......

Territory of 5,000.

Greenland.

Ye Tian came to visit the Qinya Realm Lord again.

This time, he came to ask the Qinya Realm Lord how to leave the No. 500 Territory, and by the way, he bought some information about the No. 4000 Territory, after all, he had never been there, so he naturally learned about it first, rather than going directly to it recklessly.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, are you going to the Four Thousand Territory?"

The Qinya Realm Lord asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The master of Qinya Realm said slightly: "It's okay with 007, there has been some danger here recently, several Fourth Realm have died in a row, and it is also a very good choice to leave, I am also ready to leave, and I will not come back in a short time." Since you want to leave, let me tell you a few ways to leave!"

"The first way is to leave through the Four Elephant Realm Gate, the Four Elephant Realm Gate is a force arrangement called the Four Elephant Realm Sect, you can leave directly through the Four Elephant Realm Gate, it is very safe, but you need to pay a toll, this toll is very expensive, unless there is a big event, otherwise we will never leave through the Four Elephant Realm Gate. "

"The second way is to take the corridor of the sword, it is rumored that the attack of a certain sixth realm broke through the boundary extradimensional barrier, resulting in a gap between the border superdimensional barrier between the territory of the fifth thousand and the territory of the fourth thousand, and it has not yet healed, but this route is very dangerous, and it takes a long time, if you are poor or don't want to expose yourself to leave, you can take this path. "

"There is a third way, waiting for the multi-dimensional tide, when the multi-dimensional tide, the boundary extra-dimensional barrier is very thin, and our fourth realm can easily leave, but now it is very far away from the next multi-dimensional tide, and there will be tens of millions of extra-dimensional eras. "

After the Qinya Realm Lord finished talking about these three methods, Ye Tian asked: "Can't you break it directly?"
